understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, then progress through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_* actions to shift the currently selected piece on a grid where each cell corresponds to 3 pixels, using [x,y] pixel coordinates. If a pushable object was adjacent in the direction of movement, the piece could push it along; walls/boundaries could block or alter movement depending on their specific behavior. When multiple selectables existed, CLICK with a target_position in the same coordinate system switched which piece was controlled.
